CustomField.description: Number of days past the expected donation date after which NPPatch automatically changes a Recurring Donation's status to the Closed value if no payment has been received. Leave blank or set to 0 to disable automatic closing. Typically set higher than the Days for Lapsed value to allow a lapsed period before closing. Requires Enhanced Recurring Donations.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Days past the expected donation date before a Recurring Donation is automatically closed. Leave blank to disable. Should be higher than Days for Lapsed.
CustomField.label: Status Automation Days for Closed
